ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Employee's date of birth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employer of the employee */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highest level of education completed by the employee */,
  "marriage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the employee */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current job role of the employee */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the employee */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the employee */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the employee is based */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Employee's performance rating */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_marriage_id FOREIGN KEY ("marriage_id") REFERENCES marriages ("marriage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employer_id FOREIGN KEY ("employer_id") REFERENCES employers ("employer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employers" (
  "employer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employer */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., Masters, Some-college) */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Specific degree or certification */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the degree was obtained */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year the degree was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job (e.g., Prof-specialty, Adm-clerical) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "salary_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum salary range for the job role */,
  "salary_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum salary range for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marriages" (
  "marriage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marriage_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the spouse (if applicable) */,
  "spouse_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the spouse (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marriage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the employee (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "pronouns" TEXT /* Preferred pronouns of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Country where the employee is based (e.g., United-States) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent where the country is located */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
